entry.title: xAI Ships Grok Imagine Video 1.5 With Native Audio and 2x Faster Generation
entry.summary: xAI's Grok Imagine Video 1.5 exits preview with native audio, faster generation, and the top spot on the image-to-video leaderboard

entry.title: Cursor's Origin Takes on GitHub With AI Agent-Scale Git Hosting
entry.summary: Cursor announces Origin, an agent-native Git hosting platform built to handle the throughput demands of parallel AI agents, taking direct aim at GitHub

entry.title: Midjourney Reveals Its First Hardware Project, the Orb You Walk Inside
entry.summary: Midjourney is unveiling its first-ever physical product at a live San Francisco event â and the only clue is that you can go inside it.

entry.title: NVIDIA's SpatialClaw Beats Every Spatial AI Agent by 11 Points Without Training
entry.summary: NVIDIA Research's SpatialClaw uses a persistent Python kernel as its action interface, beating prior spatial agents by 11.2 points across 20 benchmarks with no training required.

entry.title: OpenAI's Deployment Simulation Caught a GPT-5.1 Bug Before It Shipped
entry.summary: OpenAI's Deployment Simulation replays real user conversations with candidate models to predict safety failures before release, catching novel misalignments traditional red-teaming misses.

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Code Study Finds Domain Expertise Beats Coding Background
entry.summary: Anthropic's new economic research on 400K Claude Code sessions reveals that domain expertise, not coding background, is the real driver of success with AI coding agents

entry.title: Exa Agent Collapses Web Research Into One API Call at Half the Cost
entry.summary: Exa's new /agent endpoint delivers frontier web research with structured outputs at less than half the cost of GPT-5.5 or Claude Opus

entry.title: Vercel's AI SDK 7 Lets Developers Swap Claude Code and Codex Like Models
entry.summary: Vercel's AI SDK 7 beta lands with HarnessAgent for Claude Code and Codex, typed tool context, durable WorkflowAgent, and a new video generation API

entry.title: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 Hits 1M Context at 10x Cheaper Than Claude
entry.summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 arrives with a 5x context jump to 1M tokens, dual reasoning modes, MIT open weights, and pricing roughly 10x cheaper than US frontier models

entry.title: Google Research Maps England's Hidden Hedgerows With Satellite AI
entry.summary: Google Research releases a vectorized ecological dataset for England, turning AI-detected hedgerows and copses into actionable conservation and carbon-accounting tools.

entry.title: Nous Research's Hermes Agent Can Now Spend Real Money Autonomously
entry.summary: Nous Research, NVIDIA, and Stripe launch a $17,500+ hackathon to build AI agents that can autonomously earn, spend, and run real business operations using Hermes Agent's new financial and safety integrations.

entry.title: George Hotz's Tinygrad Crashes MLPerf With 25,000 Lines of Python
entry.summary: Tiny Corp's 25,000-line open-source framework lands on the official MLPerf Training v6.0 leaderboard, training Llama 8B on AMD MI350X hardware with a fully custom software stack
